message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect completed documentation and test work:
- Mark coverage matrix task (bd-2bfy) as complete
- Update testing guide and E2E spec task status
- Sync dependency relationships

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Ingest NTM `--robot-is-working` to improve stuck/idle detection.

Scope:
- Use as additional signal for alerts (stuck agent, no progress).

Definition of Done:
- Alerting uses is-working signal and records reason in alert metadata.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:31.595096022Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:56:54.532243970Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:56:54.531849588Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alerts","ntm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3t9v","depends_on_id":"bd-228a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:50.227797696Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3t9v","depends_on_id":"bd-284u","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:31.738851612Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3t9v","depends_on_id":"bd-2h6i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:53.179283278Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

- Tests pass and validate logging contract for all clients.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-22T18:36:56.701905152Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T16:35:37.714940322Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["clients","logging","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3vj0","depends_on_id":"bd-2k6i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-22T18:37:20.659362977Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"bd-3vj0","title":"Unit tests for logging standards compliance","description":"Goal:
- Validate all tool clients emit structured logs with required fields.

Scope:
- Test that tool name, command, args, latency, exitCode, correlationId are present.
- Verify sensitive data redaction (API keys, tokens).
- Fixture-based tests for each client adapter.

Definition of Done:
- Tests pass and validate logging contract for all clients.","notes":"Created apps/gateway/src/utils/__tests__/cli-logging.test.ts with 59 tests validating ADR-007 logging standards compliance:
- redactArgs: 15 tests for sensitive argument redaction (password, token, api-key, auth, etc.)
- truncateOutput: 8 tests for output truncation at 500 chars
- buildCliCommandLogFields: 11 tests for required fields (tool, command, args, latencyMs, exitCode, correlationId)
- buildCliResultLogFields: 5 tests for result fields and sensitive data redaction
- Logging functions: 7 smoke tests
- createToolLogger: 8 tests for scoped logger factory
- Integration: 5 tests for full logging flow and field validation

All tests pass. DoD met: Tests validate logging contract for all clients.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-22T18:36:56.701905152Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T16:41:19.486274389Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T16:41:19.486210548Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["clients","logging","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3vj0","depends_on_id":"bd-2k6i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-22T18:37:20.659362977Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
